description: Emotions, compulsions, behavioral triggers, and mental vulnerabilities.
weaknesses: Counting Compulsion
Scatter seeds or coins and it must stop to count every one. Its lair is obsessively organized, and it mutters numbers even in casual conversation.
Broken Promise Backlash
Breaking its word causes immediate, devastating harm to itself. It chooses every phrase with surgical care and has a reputation for keeping promises to the letter.
Riddle Locked
Pose it a riddle and it cannot act until it solves or surrenders. It speaks in riddles itself, hoards puzzle books, and its pride will not let it admit defeat easily.
Gambling Compulsion
It cannot refuse a game of chance and must play fairly. It carries dice or cards, and old legends tell of fortunes lost at its own table.
Compliment Vulnerability
Sincere praise disrupts it completely. It insults constantly, cannot accept a kind word, and destroys beautiful things rather than risk admiring them.
Unfinished Business
One task from its former life remains incomplete, and the reminder consumes it. It returns to the same locations, obsessing over old work it can never finish.
Childhood Toy Paralysis
Its childhood comfort object renders it helpless with grief and longing. A hidden room holds old toys, and it reacts strongly to objects that resemble them.
Mother's Maiden Name
Speaking its mother's maiden name causes it visible pain. Its genealogy has been carefully erased, and the maternal line is nowhere in the records.
Upside-Down Weakness
Inversion strips it of all power. It never climbs inverted, builds architecture that prevents it, and keeps obsessive track of its own balance.
Sentimental Object
One cherished object holds its heart. If that object is destroyed, grief overwhelms it completely. It guards one item above all others, hidden in a private shrine.
Forgotten Birthday
It does not know its own birthdate, and the uncertainty gnaws at it. It obsesses over calendars, hoards birth records, and fixates on astrology for answers.
Spinning Dizziness
Spinning objects sicken it. Spinning wheels, dancers, whirling tops, all leave it reeling. It destroys windmills and keeps nothing that rotates in its lair.
Doorway Counting
It must count every doorway it passes through and starts over if it loses count. Architecture with many doors traps it in an endless, muttering loop.
Ownership Obligation
It cannot take what is owned without permission. Property marks are supernatural shields, and it only steals what has been abandoned.
Odd Number Weakness
Only odd-numbered groups can harm it. It counts its attackers obsessively and manipulates situations to ensure even numbers.
Compliment Fishing
It compulsively fishes for praise and drops its guard while waiting. Mirrors line its walls, it speaks of itself constantly, and vanity is a lever anyone can pull.
Debt Cannot Default
It is supernaturally bound to repay every debt. Owing anything weakens it, and it settles accounts with frantic urgency, terrified of carrying a balance.
Shadow Separation
Separated from its shadow, it loses nearly all its power. It guards its shadow fiercely and avoids anything that might sever the connection.
Waltz Paralysis
The rhythm of a waltz compels it to dance uncontrollably. It destroys dance halls, despises triple meter, and cannot resist the count of three.
Yawn Contagion
It yawns when others do, and the chain reaction can leave it incapacitated. It avoids fatigued company and fights poorly against the visibly tired.
Hiccup Helplessness
Hiccups render it completely helpless. It eats and drinks with exaggerated care and dreads sudden surprises that might trigger an episode.
Wrong Name Response
Call any name with authority and it must respond, uncertain which name is truly its own. It reacts to every callout, and the confusion runs deep.
